title: tofu-opnsense provider
description: Native OPNsense REST API OpenTofu/Terraform provider. Generic over /api/<module>/<controller>/<command>[/<uuid>] (HTTP Basic key/secret). One opnsense_object resource + data source cover the standard addItem/getItem/setItem/delItem+reconfigure model CRUD and the get/set settings-singleton pattern, importing existing config to 0-diff via a manage-declared-only subset plan modifier.

phases.title: Core (generic, full coverage)
phases.exit_criteria: Builds, vets, tests; one resource + data source cover all /api module/controller commands.

items.feature: REST transport (Basic key/secret auth, stateless GET/POST, insecure TLS, APIError/NotFound)
opnsense_object resource: collection CRUD (addItem/getItem/setItem/delItem) + singleton (get/set) + reconfigure apply + ImportState (<module>/<controller>[/<uuid>][|<reconfigure>])
Manage-declared-only drift: subset plan modifier (declared keys match device -> 0-diff; never clobbers unmanaged fields); controller-key envelope wrap/unwrap; empty getItem -> removed from state
opnsense_object data source (read any /api GET command path)

phases.title: Validate against live OPNsense
phases.exit_criteria: A lab OPNsense object imports to 0-diff and create/update/delete cycle through the provider.

items.feature: Provider installable on the Semaphore runner (filesystem_mirror + scoped .terraformrc); tofu init verified
Live import to 0-diff proven against a lab OPNsense (NEVER house-opnsense); create/update/delete on a throwaway alias
Acceptance tests (TF_ACC) against a throwaway/lab OPNsense

phases.title: net/routers migration
phases.exit_criteria: OPNsense targets in net/routers emit opnsense_object from native NetBox modeling; scottwinkler/shell adapter retired; firewall managed via Semaphore to 0-diff.

items.feature: required_providers + opnsense provider; firewall alias/rule/NAT/interface modeling converted to opnsense_object from NetBox (netbox-pf plugin SoT)

phases.title: Ergonomics + release
phases.exit_criteria: Optional typed sugar; CI; registry publish.

items.feature: Typed sugar resources (alias, rule, nat) over the generic core
CI (build/vet/test) + GoReleaser + registry publish + docs gen
